nasb.text: Whoever possessed precious stones gave them to the treasury of the house of the Lord, in care of Jehiel the Gershonite.

esv.text: And whoever had precious stones gave them to the treasury of the house of the Lord, in the care of Jehiel the Gershonite.

cnv.text: 有寶石的，都交到耶和華殿這庫房，由革順人耶歇經辦。

ccb.text: 有宝石的人都把宝石交到耶和华殿的库房，由革顺人耶歇保管。
